title: taraxacum cyclocentrum
intro: Taraxacum cyclocentrum, also known as the Hawaya or Hawaya Hawk's Beak, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cyclocentrum are attributed to its ability to aid digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
